metadata.reference: J. I. Larruquert, L. V. Rodríguez-de Marcos, J. A. Méndez, P. J. Martin, A. Bendavid. High reflectance ta-C coatings in the extreme ultraviolet. Opt. Exp. 21, 27537-27549 (2013) (Numerical data kindly provided by Juan Larruquert)
metadata.comments: ta-C: tetrahedral amorphous carbon. Density: 3.25 g/cm<sup>3</sup>. Film deposited at room temperature.
